name: Heat Death

phase_0.boundary_condition: The event horizon of the universe itself—the boundary beyond which no information returns, the ultimate TANCH that contains all thermodynamic processes.

VINIT.justification: Void/uninitialized state before spacetime geometry exists. The primordial quantum vacuum—pure potential, no distinctions yet.

TANCH.chosen_element: The event horizon at infinite time
TANCH.justification: Terminal anchor ⊤. The closed boundary that contains all cosmic evolution. No information escapes; all processes terminate here.

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism →. Directed transformation from hot dense state toward cold dilute state. Irreversible arrow of time.

AREV.justification: Contravariant ←. Reverse/descent transformation. The system descends from order to disorder, from structure to homogeneity.

CLINK.chosen_element: Thermodynamic coupling between radiation, matter, and dark energy
CLINK.justification: Composition ∘. Sequential chaining of eras: radiation-dominated → matter-dominated → dark-energy-dominated. Each era's end-state is the next era's initial condition.

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: The cosmic microwave background (CMB) as self-reference
IMSCRIB.justification: Identity id. The universe observes itself through the CMB—the fossil imprint of the universe's own earlier state. Self-recognition at z≈1100.

FSPLIT.chosen_element: Recombination epoch: electrons and protons separate into neutral atoms
FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication δ. One plasma state branches into two distinct phases: ionized (before) and neutral (after). The universe differentiates itself.

FFUSE.chosen_element: Structure formation: gravitational collapse of density perturbations into galaxies and clusters
FFUSE.justification: Multiplication μ. Branches reconstitute: the neutral atoms (from FSPLIT output) fuse back into a unified gravitational hierarchy. Distinctions re-cohere at larger scales.

EVALT.chosen_element: Successful structure formation—galaxies, stars, planets, life emerge
EVALT.justification: True/affirmative branch. Positive evaluation: the universe's capacity for complexity is actualized. Consciousness emerges.

EVALF.chosen_element: Heat death completion—all stars burned out, all black holes evaporated, universe approaches maximum entropy
EVALF.justification: False/negative branch. Negative evaluation: the universe's capacity for structure is exhausted. Complexity dissolves.

ENGAGR.chosen_element: The eternal recurrence paradox—the universe simultaneously approaching heat death AND containing the memory of all that was
ENGAGR.justification: Both simultaneously. A paradice: the universe is both dead (maximum entropy) and alive (information preserved in the CMB and fossil records). Held without resolution.

IFIX.chosen_element: The final state: the Boltzmann brain or the infinite cold void—the permanent, irreversible record of all that occurred
IFIX.justification: ROM fixation. Permanent, append-only, cannot be undone. The heat death is the ultimate IFIX seal—the universe's final imprint.

phase_2.fuse_element: Gravitational structure formation (atoms collapse into galaxies)
phase_2.fuse_result: Unified gravitational hierarchy (matter and radiation re-coupled through gravity)

phase_3.void_description: 00 — The Big Bang singularity: infinite density, infinite temperature, no spacetime geometry, no distinctions. Pure potential before differentiation.
phase_3.true_description: 01 — The era of structure: galaxies, stars, planets, life. Complexity actualized. The universe knows itself through conscious observers.
phase_3.false_description: 10 — Heat death: maximum entropy, zero temperature, no structure, no energy gradients, no life. The universe has forgotten itself.
phase_3.both_description: 11 — The eternal paradice: the universe is simultaneously heat-dead (no energy to do work) AND containing the complete fossil record of all that was. Both states held without resolution—a paraconsistent cosmos.

steps.domain_action: The Big Bang singularity emerges from the quantum vacuum—void state before spacetime.
Cosmic expansion begins. Scale factor a(t) increases. The universe differentiates itself from the singularity.
Entropy increases. The universe descends from order (low entropy, high temperature) toward disorder (high entropy, low temperature).
Recombination epoch at z≈1100. Electrons and protons separate into neutral atoms. The plasma differentiates into matter and radiation.
Neutral atoms allow photons to decouple. The CMB is released. Structure formation begins—gravity amplifies density perturbations.
Galaxies form. Stars ignite. Planets coalesce. Chemistry emerges. Life begins on suitable worlds. Consciousness arises.
The radiation-dominated era chains to the matter-dominated era chains to the dark-energy-dominated era. Each era's physics determines the next.
The CMB is the universe's self-portrait—the fossil imprint of its own earlier state. The universe observes itself through this ancient light.
Stars burn their fuel. Entropy increases locally and globally. The universe's capacity for complexity is finite.
Black holes form and evaporate via Hawking radiation. All massive objects decay. The universe approaches maximum entropy.
The last stars burn out. The last black holes evaporate. The universe reaches heat death—maximum entropy, zero temperature.
No energy gradients remain. No work can be done. No life can exist. The universe is dead.
The gravitational hierarchy that formed from recombination's neutral atoms dissolves. Galaxies disperse. Matter decays into radiation.
The branches reconstitute: all matter and radiation and dark energy converge to a uniform, cold, maximally entropic state.
The universe is both dead (heat death achieved) AND alive (the CMB and fossil records preserve the memory of all that was). A paradice.
The final state is sealed. Heat death is irreversible. The universe's imprint is permanent. The IFIX seal is affixed to eternity.
The event horizon at infinite time contains all of cosmic history. No information escapes. The boundary closes.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: General Relativity + Thermodynamics. The Einstein field equations translate the distribution of mass-energy into spacetime curvature. The second law of thermodynamics translates the arrow of time into entropy increase.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Gravitational coupling and electromagnetic radiation. Galaxies communicate through gravity (structure formation). Stars communicate through photons (light). The universe integrates all interactions through the metric tensor.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The cosmic microwave background (CMB) stores the fossil imprint of recombination. Stellar nucleosynthesis stores the history of element creation. Black hole thermodynamics stores information in the event horizon (Hawking radiation).
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Friedmann equations determine the expansion rate a(t). The equation of state w (ratio of pressure to density) determines which era dominates. Dark energy (w ≈ -1) eventually dominates and drives eternal expansion.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB). The canonical reference state—the universe's own self-portrait at z≈1100. All structure formation is seeded by perturbations in the CMB. The CMB is the bootstrap store from which all complexity emerges.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Usable energy (negentropy). Each cycle of structure formation consumes the universe's finite energy budget. Stars burn fuel. Black holes radiate. Entropy increases.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Early universe: low entropy, high temperature, high energy density, structured (galaxies, stars, life). The universe is young and complex.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Late universe: high entropy, low temperature, low energy density, homogeneous (heat death). The universe is old and dead.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS > 0 — The cosmic entropy always increases. Heat death is the inevitable final state. The second law of thermodynamics is absolute. The universe is a one-way process from order to disorder. The cycle is entropy-increasing, not conservative—this is the fundamental asymmetry of cosmic time.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AFWD → AREV → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALT → CLINK → IMSCRIB → AREV → AREV → EVALF → EVALF → FFUSE → FFUSE → ENGAGR → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: Heat Death
-- Fingerprint: sig=(8,3,5,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=17
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(3, 12)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑾  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑼 → 𐑗  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [2] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑾 → 𐑚  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [3] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [7] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑚 → 𐑙  | identity — self-imscription
--   [8] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [9] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [10] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [11] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [12] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑙  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [13] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [14] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑭  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [15] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑳 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [16] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def heat_death_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The Big Bang singularity emerges from the quantum vacuum—void state before sp...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑗)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Cosmic expansion begins. Scale factor a(t) increases. The universe differenti...)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑾 𐑚)  -- [2] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Entropy increases. The universe descends from order (low entropy, high temper...)
  -- FSPLIT [3] (gran := 𐑚) (Recombination epoch at z≈1100. Electrons and protons separate into neutral atoms. The plasma differentiates into matter and radiation.) / FFUSE [12] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (6 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Neutral atoms allow photons to decouple. The CMB is released. Structure forma...)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Galaxies form. Stars ignite. Planets coalesce. Chemistry emerges. Life begins...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The radiation-dominated era chains to the matter-dominated era chains to the ...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑠 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The CMB is the universe's self-portrait—the fossil imprint of its own earlier...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Stars burn their fuel. Entropy increases locally and globally. The universe's...)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [9] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Black holes form and evaporate via Hawking radiation. All massive objects dec...)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [10] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The last stars burn out. The last black holes evaporate. The universe reaches...)
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [11] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (No energy gradients remain. No work can be done. No life can exist. The unive...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [12]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑙)  -- [12] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The gravitational hierarchy that formed from recombination's neutral atoms dissolves. Galaxies disperse. Matter decays into radiation.)
  (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [13] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 | fuse μ — assembly mode (The branches reconstitute: all matter and radiation and dark energy converge ...)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [14] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The universe is both dead (heat death achieved) AND alive (the CMB and fossil...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [15] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The final state is sealed. Heat death is irreversible. The universe's imprint...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [16] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The event horizon at infinite time contains all of cosmic history. No informa...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def heat_death_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (heat_death_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def heat_death_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (heat_death_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem heat_death_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
